Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Matiasevich for Jessica Paul (Petitioner).

There being no opposition, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Giselle Casey CSR#8098. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.
